calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2016 Continued To Nov-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jeremy F. Hanika of Hanika Law Offices (415-430-7913) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Robert J. Nolan of Squire Patton Boggs LLP (415-743-2445) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

Court initially calls the matter, then passes it to allow moving counsel to review a first amended complaint submitted by plaintiff electronically for filing the night before. Recalling the matter, court hears from counsel on any legal basis why the Court should not take the motion off calendar. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE PROCTOR & GAMBLE COMPANY'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs Complaint is OFF CALENDAR as moot. Plaintiff has leave to file first amended complaint.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Jeremy F. Hanika of Hanika Law Offices (415-430-7913) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Robert J. Nolan of Squire Patton Boggs LLP (415-743-2445) appears as counsel for defendant/demurring party

Court initially calls the matter, then passes it to allow moving counsel to review a first amended complaint submitted by plaintiff electronically for filing the night before. Recalling the matter, court hears from counsel on any legal basis why the Court should not take the motion off calendar. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE PROCTOR & GAMBLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT as to the fifth cause of action for misrepresentation is OFF CALENDAR as moot. Plaintiff has leave to file first amended complaint.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2016 Continued To Sep-21-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
